description_long: This wardrobe features a robust, rectangular structure with a dark wood finish and a prominent cornice at the top, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front showcases two large sliding doors, one of which is fitted with a full-length mirror panel, while the other displays a matching wood grain. The sides are plain, emphasizing the depth and solid construction of the piece. Subtle recessed handles are present on the doors, maintaining a streamlined look. The wardrobe likely contains ample storage space inside, suitable for hanging clothes and storing personal items. Its overall design is both functional and visually appealing, making it suitable for urban interiors or transitional spaces.
description: A dark wood sliding-door wardrobe with a mirrored panel and classic cornice detailing, offering both storage and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large doors, one mirrored and one plain, with subtle handles and a prominent top cornice.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, deep wood panel and the overhanging cornice at the top.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view highlighting the wood grain, sliding door tracks, and the mirrored panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood panel and cornice.
